text:
I can help you set reminders for tasks or patient care.

• Task reminder (e.g. submit incident report, attend meeting) → tell me the task, date, and time
• Patient care reminder (e.g. check on Bed 3, medication round) → tell me the task, patient/bed, date, and time

Once confirmed, I'll add it to your calendar with a 15-minute alert and send the details to your email.

What would you like to be reminded about?
